docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY AGUILAR LUIS ALONSO AS TO DEFENDANT OKAMOTO PETER A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-06-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AGUILAR LUIS ALONSO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OKAMOTO PETER A $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,013.00, DEF.TO PAY $100.00 PER MONTH.1ST PAYMENT DUE 2/1/ 92.AT END OF 12MOS.ENTIRE BALANCE PAID IN LUMP SUM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PET. TO SET ASIDE PAYMENTS FILED BY PLTF.AGUILAR.
PET.TO SET ASIDE TERMS SIGNED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OKAMOTO PETER A
